word: H6584 - פָּשַׁט - pâshaṭ - paw-shat' - Fall upon

sections.paragraph:
Original: פּשׁט

Transliteration: pâshaṭ

Phonetic: paw-shat'

BDB Definition:

  1. to strip, invade, strip off, make a dash, raid, spread out
    1. (Qal)
      1. to strip off, put off
      2. to put off (one's shelter), make a dash
    2. (Piel) to strip
    3. (Hiphil)
      1. to strip of
      2. to strip off
      3. to flay
    4. (Hithpael) to strip oneself of

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 1845

Part(s) of speech: Verb
